task_description: Create a single index.html file for the Manulife Saving Protector (MSP) product page, following the layout/style of index (17).html but with MSP-specific content, including a fully functional premium calculator.

verification.summary: All verification passed: file is 34506 bytes, valid HTML5 with matching tags (89 divs), all 6 tabs present, calculator math verified correct for all term/currency combinations, modal faktor conversion correct, WA link correct, no external dependencies, no MiUHC references, responsive CSS included.
